title: Alpha Finance - REKT
relevance_summary: Complex multi-transaction attack exploiting rounding miscalculations and manipulation of internal debt numbers in a pre-release protocol.

prevention.rule: Block any tx that manipulates internal debt numbers in a pre-release protocol with no liquidity.
prevention.trigger: DEBT_MANIPULATION -> no liquidity in the pool

monitoring_rules: Block tx manipulating internal debt numbers in a pre-release protocol without liquidity.
summary: A complex attack exploited rounding miscalculations and manipulated internal debt numbers in a pre-release Alpha Homora v2 contract, resulting in $37.5 million theft. A guard could have detected this by blocking transactions that manipulate internal debt numbers in contracts without liquidity.
